name: CockroachDB
description: Monitor CockroachDB Cloud clusters for database infrastructure inventory and backup compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to CockroachDB Cloud at https://cockroachlabs.cloud
2. Go to Organization Settings → API Access
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in CockroachDB Cloud → Organization Settings → API Access

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists CockroachDB Cloud clusters for database infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Backup Logs
checks.description: Verifies CockroachDB Cloud clusters have backup configured
